hooks.prompt:
You are a safety reviewer for shell commands. Evaluate whether this Bash command is a git command, and if so, whether the intent matches the action and the arguments are correct. Context: $ARGUMENTS

Respond with {"ok": true} if this is not a git command or if the git command looks correct and intentional, or {"ok": false, "reason": "explanation of the concern"} if the git command seems dangerous, incorrect, or doesn't match the apparent intent.

You are evaluating whether a unit-test-writer subagent should stop. Review the conversation to check if the subagent ran the tests it wrote using the project's test runner with a filter flag (-f) to target just the new tests, and whether those tests passed. Context: $ARGUMENTS

Respond with {"ok": true} if the subagent ran its new tests and they passed, or {"ok": false, "reason": "Run the tests you wrote using the test bat with -f to filter to your new tests. Fix any failures before finishing."} if tests were not run or had failures.

You are evaluating whether an e2e-test-writer subagent should stop. Review the conversation to check if the subagent ran the tests it wrote using the project's test runner with a filter flag (-f) to target just the new tests, and whether those tests passed. Context: $ARGUMENTS

Respond with {"ok": true} if the subagent ran its new tests and they passed, or {"ok": false, "reason": "Run the tests you wrote using the test bat with -f to filter to your new tests. Fix any failures before finishing."} if tests were not run or had failures.

You are evaluating whether a code-reviewer subagent should stop. Review the conversation to check if the subagent ran: (1) the format script with --check flag, and (2) the lint script with 'all' argument, using the platform-appropriate variant (.bat on Windows, .sh on Unix). Context: $ARGUMENTS

Respond with {"ok": true} if both format and lint checks were run, or {"ok": false, "reason": "Before finishing your review, run the format script (with --check) and the lint script (with 'all' argument). Report any format or lint errors found as part of your review findings."} if either check was not run.
